productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Originals Mono Flight Green Bags
description: Why not add some pop to your bag collection with this classic-looking Originals Mono Grip Bag from puma! Length: 28 cm Made of 100% PU with a 150D polyester lining and PU backing for durability and easy maintenance Two-way zip opening into the main compartment Internal zip, mobile and slip-in pockets for storage Woven puma Archive label inside Colour-matching piped PU handles and adjustable webbing shoulder strap Metallic color-matching Puma Heritage zipper pulls Embossed Puma cat and Number 1 logo on front Plastic bottom feet for stand-alone comfort Care only hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wring Line dry Do not iron
